message:
fix(combinator): replace polled-after-completion panics with graceful Cancelled outcome

src/combinator/hedge.rs:
- Replace assert!(!this.completed) panic in poll() with a graceful
  return of Poll::Ready(HedgeResult::PrimaryFast(Outcome::Cancelled))
  when the hedge future is polled after completion, preventing runtime
  panics in executors that may spuriously re-poll completed futures

src/combinator/retry.rs:
- Replace panic!("retry future polled after completion") with a graceful
  return of Poll::Ready(RetryResult::Cancelled) for the same reason

src/time/interval.rs:
- Add clarifying comment on Copy-derived binding

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
